---
title-meta: "Weight-aware imputation for policy microsimulation"
author-meta: "Max Ghenis; María Juaristi"
date: ""
bibliography: bibliography/references.bib
format:
  html:
    cite-method: citeproc
    link-citations: true
    link-bibliography: true
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    classoption: 11pt
    pdf-engine: pdflatex
    cite-method: natbib
    biblio-style: plainnat
    include-in-header:
      - preamble.tex
    keep-tex: true
number-sections: true
---

<!-- Author list and order TBD: this manuscript absorbs the unpublished
microimpute paper's task designs and appendix, so align authorship with
María Juaristi (and any other microimpute-manuscript authors) before
circulation or submission. -->

\title{Weight-aware imputation for policy microsimulation}

\author{
    Max Ghenis\thanks{PolicyEngine. Corresponding author: max@policyengine.org} \and
    María Juaristi\footnotemark[1]
}
\date{}

\maketitle

\input{sections/abstract}
\input{sections/introduction}
\input{sections/background}
\input{sections/methodology}
\input{sections/data}
\input{sections/results}
\input{sections/discussion}
\input{sections/conclusion}
\input{sections/disclosures}
